name: Shattered Dreams: that one time when all my applications got rejected, so I started my own company. My life became an idle / clicker game where I must increase all incremental values and squeeze my employees for every last bit of soul they have left.
short_description: Do you hate your life? Well, boy, do I have the game for you! Follow the story of a social reject turned evil, soul-sucking CEO. Battle your inner demons, suppress workers' unions, and travel through
